inspectorStandaloneEmptyHint: Drop a video file here or click “Open…”. When launched from the menu, the last preview file is used if it is still on disk.
inspectorStandaloneEmptyRegionAria: Hint when no file is open yet
inspectorStandaloneFfprobeRefreshTitle: Run ffprobe again for the current file
inspectorStandaloneMainAria: Inspector workspace: hint, error, and ffprobe summary
inspectorStandaloneOpenPickTitle: Pick a local media file (same allowlist as preview)
inspectorStandalonePathFooterAria: Full path of the open file
inspectorStandaloneProbeStackAria: ffprobe results for the current file
inspectorStandaloneThemeToggleTitle: Toggle theme (in sync with the main window)
